description_long: This is a medium-sized ceramic bowl with a rounded body and two small, slightly flared handles on opposite sides. The bowl is predominantly white with a glossy finish, and it features a decorative blue-green rim that appears hand-painted, giving it a rustic, artisanal look. The name 'Colin' is inscribed in a cursive script on the side, suggesting personalization or custom craftsmanship. The interior of the bowl is also white, with the blue-green accent continuing along the inner rim. The bowl sits on a flat, circular wooden surface, which is not part of the bowl itself. There are no visible cracks, chips, or stains, and the surface appears smooth and well-maintained.
description: A white ceramic bowl with blue-green hand-painted rim and two small handles, featuring the name 'Colin' inscribed on the side. The bowl has a glossy, smooth finish and an artisanal appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Colin' inscription, both handles, and the blue-green rim detail.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the bowl's depth, one handle, and the continuation of the blue-green rim.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bowl, both handles, and the full circular shape of the rim.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the bowl's profile, one handle, and the blue-green rim's texture.
attribute_decorative_patterns: blue-green hand-painted rim and the name 'Colin' inscribed in cursive on the side
